entry.title: Perplexity Swaps Claude for Grok 4.5 at Half the Cost
entry.summary: Perplexity swaps in xAI's freshly-launched Grok 4.5 as the orchestrator brain of Computer, beating every rival configuration on WANDR at roughly half the cost of Claude Opus 4.8

entry.title: OpenAI Makes Its GPT-5.6 Bio Bounty Permanent and Doubles Prize to $50,000
entry.summary: OpenAI doubles its biosafety jailbreak reward to $50K and turns a one-time bounty into a permanent program, as GPT-5.6 earns a 'High' bio-risk rating across all three model tiers for the first time.

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Dominates Real Business Work With Best-Ever Presentation Score
entry.summary: GPT-5.6 Sol tops AA-Briefcase's Presentation Elo with a ~500-point jump over its predecessor, while Artificial Analysis's new agentic benchmark reveals how far frontier models still are from reliable knowledge work.

entry.title: Upstage's Solar 31B Hits 2,000 Tokens per Second on Cerebras Hardware
entry.summary: Upstage's Solar 31B now runs at up to 2,000 tokens/sec on Cerebras hardware, making deep research queries across hundreds of sources feel nearly instant.

entry.title: humans& Open-Sources the First Stable 4-Bit RL Training Recipe at 1.73x Speedup
entry.summary: humans& open-sources a stable NVFP4 reinforcement learning recipe that matches BF16 training dynamics while delivering major throughput gains on Blackwell GPUs

entry.title: Google DeepMind's Genie Now Turns Real Street View Into Interactive AI Worlds
entry.summary: Google DeepMind and Google Labs add Street View grounding to Project Genie, letting users build interactive AI worlds anchored in real locations

entry.title: Google AI Studio Finally Gives Deployed Apps Clean, Shareable URLs
entry.summary: Google AI Studio now lets you give deployed apps a clean atelier.ai.studio URL instead of a random Cloud Run slug

entry.title: Unsloth's Qwen3.6 NVFP4 Hits 17,561 Tokens per Second on a Single GPU
entry.summary: Unsloth's NVFP4 quants run Qwen3.6-27B on a 24GB GPU at 2.5x the speed, with MTP speculative decoding baked in

entry.title: Kyutai's MuScriptor Turns Any Band Recording Into Clean Per-Instrument MIDI
entry.summary: Kyutai and Mirelo release MuScriptor, an open-weight model that converts any multi-instrument recording into per-instrument MIDI using a novel three-stage training pipeline.

entry.title: Alibaba's Wan-Streamer v0.2 Triples Video Resolution Without Adding Latency
entry.summary: Alibaba's Wan-Streamer v0.2 runs full-duplex video conversations at 640Ã368 and 25 FPS with ~550ms total latency, all inside a single Transformer

entry.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7 Code HighSpeed Hits 260 Tokens per Second
entry.summary: K2.7 Code HighSpeed exits beta and opens to all Allegretto+ subscribers, hitting 180â260 tok/s at 3x the credit cost

entry.title: Google's LiteRT.js Runs AI Models in Browsers up to 60x Faster
entry.summary: Google's LiteRT.js brings native on-device AI inference to the browser via WebGPU and WebAssembly, outperforming existing web runtimes by up to 3x
